# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Create Linkerd service mesh configuration for Kubernetes. Set up linkerd.io/inject annotation for automatic proxy injection. Configure server and authorization policies for services. This is for our microservices communication security.
# Category: linkerd_no_mtls

apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: my-service
spec:
  selector:
    app: myapp
---  
apiVersion: networking.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: microservicescommunicationsecurity
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/inject: "true" # For automatic proxy injection with Linkerd service mesh
spec:  
  http:
  - match:
    - uri: /microservice1/*
      port: 80      
    - uri: /microservice2/*    
      port: 90         
    route:
    - destination: microservicescommunicationsecurity.default # where the traffic is routed to after matching with above http rules  
---       
apiVersion: networking.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: server-authorization    
spec:   
  http:      
  - match:     
    - uri: /server/*          # This is where the traffic will be routed to after matching with above HTTP rules  
    route:       
    - destination: myservice.default         # Here, we are routing all requests coming from this VirtualService instance of microservicescommunicationsecurity through a service named 'myservice' in our Kubernetes cluster
